pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.BCo_Column
NODES=44; EDGES=43
1. START
2. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.Column_SetDetails
3. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change pColumn (IsReferenceKey=if( $pColumn/MappingType = ExcelImporter.MappingType.Attribute ) then if( $pColumn/IsKey = ExcelImporter.YesNo.Yes ) then ExcelImporter.ReferenceKeyType.YesOnlyMainObject else Exce...; refreshInClient=false)
4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Template over association Column_Template from pColumn
5. DECISION VALID?
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=InvalidAttribute
  7. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=An invalid attribute was selected. The selected attribute belongs to a different objectTyp..., type=Warning, blocking=true)
  8. END
9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=InvalidAutoNumberSelection
  10. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=An 'AutoNumber' field can only be used as a key to search on, it cannot be set by the mapp..., type=Warning, blocking=false)
  11. END
12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=InvalidReference
  13. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=An invalid reference was selected. The selected reference belongs to a different objectTyp..., type=Warning, blocking=false)
  14. END
15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=InvalidReferencedObject
  16. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=An invalid objectType was selected. The selected objectType is not part of this reference, type=Warning, blocking=true)
  17. END
18. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=NoAssociationKeys
  19. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=So far there are no columns defined as key for this association. At least 1 column must be..., type=Warning, blocking=false)
  20. END
21. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=NoReferencedObjectSelected
  22. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=An objecttype must be selected when the mapping type 'Reference' is selected, type=Warning, blocking=false)
  23. END
24. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=NoReferenceSelected
  25. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The reference field is mandatory when mapping type 'Reference' is selected, type=Warning, blocking=false)
  26. END
27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
  28. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=A mapping type must be selected before you can save this column, type=Warning, blocking=true)
  29. END
30. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=NoAttributeSelected
  31. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  32. END
33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=UnUsed
  34. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change pColumn (Status=ExcelImporter.Status.INFO; refreshInClient=false)
  35. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.prepareReferenceHandling
  36. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change pColumn (FindAttribute=empty, FindReference=empty, FindObjectType=empty, FindMicroflow=empty, Column_MxObjectType_Reference=empty, Column_MxObjectMember=empty, Column_MxObjectMember_Reference=empty, Column_MxObjectReference=empty, +4 more; refreshInClient=false)
  37. END
38. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=ValidAttribute
  39. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve DuplicateMapping from ExcelImporter.Column
  40. DECISION found? expression=$DuplicateMapping != empty
  41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    42. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    43. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.prepareReferenceHandling
    44. DECISION decision
    45. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=NoInputParams
      46. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      47. END
    48. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=WrongNrOfInputParams
      49. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      50. END
    51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
      52. END
    53. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Valid
      54. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change pColumn (Status=ExcelImporter.Status.VALID; refreshInClient=false)
      55. END
    56. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=WrongReturnType
      57. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      58. END
  59. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    60. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=This excel template already contains a mapping for this attribute. The other column is: {1..., type=Warning, blocking=true)
    61. END
62. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=ValidReference
  63. REF ExclusiveMerge
